ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cores" (
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core section */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drilling site */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole from which the core was extracted */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section identifier within the hole */,
  "age_mnemonic" TEXT /* Age mnemonic for the stratigraphic layer */,
  "auxiliary_age_mnemonic" TEXT /* Auxiliary age mnemonic for the stratigraphic layer */,
  "top_depth" REAL /* Top depth of the core section in meters */,
  "bottom_depth" REAL /* Bottom depth of the core section in meters */,
  "special_condition" TEXT /* Special conditions associated with the core section */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age determination for the section */,
  "auxiliary_age" TEXT /* Auxiliary age determination for the section */,
  "averaged_age" TEXT /* Averaged age determination for the section */,
  "age_top" REAL /* Age at the top of the section in million years */,
  "age_bottom" REAL /* Age at the bottom of the section in million years */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the section in million years */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "core_length" REAL /* Length of the core section in meters */,
  "geological_unit" TEXT /* Identifier for the geological unit the core belongs to */,
  "lithology" TEXT /* Description of the lithology (rock type) of the core section */,
  "mineralogy" TEXT /* Description of the mineral composition of the core section */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the core sample */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used to extract the core sample */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the core section data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_age_mnemonic FOREIGN KEY ("age_mnemonic") REFERENCES age_determinations ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_auxiliary_age_mnemonic FOREIGN KEY ("auxiliary_age_mnemonic") REFERENCES auxiliary_age_determinations ("aux_age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cores_special_condition FOREIGN KEY ("special_condition") REFERENCES special_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the drilling site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the drilling site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the drilling site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the drilling site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the drilling site */,
  "geological_context" TEXT /* Description of the geological context of the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drilling site */,
  "hole_name" TEXT /* Name of the hole */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hole */,
  "depth" REAL /* Total depth of the hole */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the hole */,
  "drilling_method" TEXT /* Method used to drill the hole */,
  "hole_status" TEXT /* Current status of the hole */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date when the hole was drilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_determinations" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age determination */,
  "age_mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic for the age determination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age determination */,
  "age_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the age determination */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the age determination */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the age */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auxiliary_age_determinations" (
  "aux_age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auxiliary age determination */,
  "aux_age_mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic for the auxiliary age determination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the auxiliary age determination */,
  "age_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the auxiliary age determination */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the auxiliary age determination */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the auxiliary age */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aux_age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication if the source is a publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher of the data source */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the special condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the special condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the special condition */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the special condition on the core data */,
  "mitigation" TEXT /* Mitigation measures taken for the special condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "core_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core section being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the core section */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the core section was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user at the time of access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_core_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_id") REFERENCES cores ("core_id")
)
